title: How to Transfer a Call on your Jet Phone (Mobile)
text: Calls can be transferred to a target by way of a warm or attended transfer. In an attended transfer, the first party speaks to the target before transferring the call. You can make a transfer from the Phone dial pad, from Contacts, or from History. Steps While on an active call, tap Transfer . Enter the phone number or select the contact you wish to transfer to, then tap Call . Speak with the recipient to introduce the caller (attended transfer). Tap Transfer to complete. Jet Phone connects the remote party to the target and disconnects you from both calls.
